commands.review_summary:
The PR moves Canvas runtime ownership into `extensions/canvas`, removes vendored/generated A2UI surfaces, adds generic plugin HTTP/WebSocket/surface/capability seams, updates clients/docs/protocol baselines, and prunes related generated/vendor files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: current PR-head source inspection reproduces the removed redaction guidance, broad JSON formatter ignore, changelog drift, cron repair regression, plugin CLI shadowing path, cached Canvas init failure, and selected-route upgrade auth bug. I did not establish a live Canvas/A2UI runtime reproduction for the full refactor.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer-labeled XL PR with dirty state, missing real behavior proof, security-sensitive concerns, and several blocking source findings needs contributor fixes plus maintainer review.
